publishedAbstract: CEPH warnings that you need to take care of, as shown below ~~~ The Ceph cluster status is: 'HEALTH_WARN' The following warnings/errors are reported: MON_DOWN- 1/3 mons down, quorum a,d OSD_DOWN- 1 osds down OSD_HOST_DOWN- 1 host (1 osds) down OSD_RACK_DOWN- 1 rack (1 osds) down PG_DEGRADED- Degraded data redundancy: 38612/115836 objects degraded (33.333%), 113 pgs degraded, 169 pgs undersized PG_NOT_DEEP_SCRUBBED- 169 pgs not deep-scrubbed in time PG_NOT_SCRUBBED- 169 pgs not scrubbed in time ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF nodes in Not Ready State due to unapproved certificates
